design_philosophy: A visually stunning 3D landing page for GeoCoat, a premium Mineral Silicate Paint. Grounded in materiality—stone, mineral, pigment, lime, silica. The design blends scientific clarity with earthy, architectural aesthetics. Generous spacing, large expressive typography, and immersive scroll-driven 3D parallax effects create an editorial, high-end feel.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID. Asymmetrical bento layouts for features and gallery. Wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly.

motion_and_interaction.scroll: MANDATORY use of lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
motion_and_interaction.parallax: Use framer-motion useScroll and useTransform for 2.5D layer movements on hero and gallery sections.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Hovering on interactive elements must have smooth translation and color transition. Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with subtle shadow.
motion_and_interaction.3d_element: react-three-fiber for hero section (e.g., rotating mineral crystal or 3D architectural block), mapped with earthy textures and natural lighting.
motion_and_interaction.marquee: Use an editorial marquee (react-fast-marquee) for the 'Why Mineral Silicate Paint' keywords or partner logos. Very slow smooth drift, wide tracking.

components.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/40). Must not overlap page content.
components.hero: Split screen or absolute overlay. The 3D element dominates the center/right. Left side holds the massive H1 and CTA. Max overlay opacity bg-black/30 if over an image.
components.about: Editorial layout. Large quote text, offset images.
components.features_bento: Asymmetrical grid showcasing breathable, eco-friendly, durable features. Soft shadows, 1px borders.
components.color_palette: Interactive color swatches. Clicking a swatch smoothly changes a central sample area.
components.process: Step-by-step visual sequence using vertical sticky scrolling or timeline layout.
components.testimonials: Large typographic quotes, generous negative space.
components.contact: Clean Shadcn forms heavily customized to remove the 'Vercel-look'. Flat solid inputs, high contrast borders.

image_urls.description: Modern architecture exterior for hero section or process background.
Mineral paint texture. Use for card backgrounds or 3D material mapping.
Stone building facade for the About section to emphasize materiality.
Colorful stone surface representing mineral color palettes.
Modern lattice facade for applications section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add lenis framer-motion three @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei react-fast-marquee @phosphor-icons/react
You are building a high-end 3D marketing page. Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards for layouts. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the bento grids and hero section to achieve the required asymmetry and spacing.
Wrap the entire application or the main scroll container in a Lenis smooth scroll provider.

Create a 3D Canvas in the hero section using @react-three/fiber and three.js. Render a set of primitive geometries (like Icosahedron or Box) representing mineral crystals or architectural blocks. Apply a MeshStandardMaterial with roughness=0.8, metalness=0.1, and an earthy color like #EAE6DA or #C05A45. Use Drei's <Float> and <Environment preset='apartment'> to make it feel premium.
Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations (fade-in up, scale) on text elements and sections.
For the 'Why Mineral Silicate Paint' section, use the 'Bento Grid' strategy. Ensure wide gaps (gap-8) and uneven column spans.
Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, forms, 3D canvas triggers).
For the Contact Form, use Shadcn form components but strip away the default Vercel look. Use solid flat backgrounds with sharp borders.
Ensure the hero overlay opacity never exceeds bg-black/50 or bg-white/40.

Use Google Fonts: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600&display=swap'); in the CSS. Configure Tailwind config with font-sans: 'Manrope', font-heading: 'Outfit'.
